loot_collected.source: Yeemik's den — crude goblin map of trails
Klarg's cave — orders to bring dwarf and map to King Grol at Cragmaw Castle

quests.name: Deliver Supplies to Phandalin
quests.objective: Bring wagon of provisions to Barthen's Provisions in Phandalin

quests.name: Rescue Gundren Rockseeker
quests.objective: Find Cragmaw Castle and rescue Gundren — he has a map to Wave Echo Cave. King Grol has him. The Black Spider is behind it.
quests.reward: Sildar will pay the party well

quests.name: Escort Sildar to Phandalin
quests.objective: Bring Sildar Hallwinter safely to Phandalin

quests.name: Find Iarno Albrek
quests.objective: Sildar is looking for Iarno Albrek, a Lords' Alliance agent who disappeared near Phandalin two months ago

quests.name: Return Lionshield Coster Supplies
quests.objective: Return stolen supplies to Linene Graywind at the Lionshield Coster trading post

quests.name: Deal with the Redbrands
quests.objective: Clear the Redbrand gang from Phandalin. Leader is Glasstaff, hideout under Tresendar Manor. Secret tunnel entrance south of manor.

quests.name: Rescue Dendrar Family
quests.objective: Thel Dendrar was murdered by Redbrands. His wife Mirna and children are missing — likely held in the hideout.

session_notes: Chapter 1 complete. Chapter 2 Act I: arrived in Phandalin. Delivered wagon to Barthen (60gp). Returned Lionshield supplies to Linene (50gp). Sold gear (71gp). Collected Sildar escort fee (50gp). Total treasury: 273gp 23sp 22cp. Stonehill Inn: learned about Redbrands — gang led by Glasstaff, hideout under Tresendar Manor, secret tunnel south of manor. Thel Dendrar murdered, family kidnapped. Iarno Albrek still missing. No magic shop in town. Party fully rested, all slots recovered.

scaling.note: All encounters scaled for 6 PCs vs module default of 4
